root.name: Change Slide Title Text
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly changed the title text from 'REVISITING CLASSICAL SOCIAL EXPERIMENTS' to 'EXPLORING CLASSICAL SOCIAL EXPERIMENTS', without introducing errors or extraneous changes.

children.name: Correct Title Text Change
children.description: Checks that the title text was changed from 'REVISITING CLASSICAL SOCIAL EXPERIMENTS' to 'EXPLORING CLASSICAL SOCIAL EXPERIMENTS' on the intended slide.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes
children.description: Checks that no unintended slides were added, removed, or modified except for the intended title change.

children.name: No Extraneous Animations or Transitions
children.description: Checks that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or modified as part of the change.

metadata.task: Change the title text from 'REVISITING CLASSICAL SOCIAL EXPERIMENTS' to 'EXPLORING CLASSICAL SOCIAL EXPERIMENTS'
